full_text:
Hou Qi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hou Qi. May have been a disciple of Yang Hou, an expert in Huang-Lao doctrines. Executed by Cao Cao. Hou Qi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Hou Qi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
